---
title: "Interactive Map of Site Locations"
subtitle: Interactive map to view sediment site locations with meta information
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Note on Distance Accuracy

Calculated distances represent the shortest Euclidean path to the nearest coastline geometry (GSHHG dataset).

While the data is projected (EPSG:3035) to minimize distortion at high latitudes, please interpret these values as **estimates**. In areas with complex topography—such as narrow fjords or dense archipelagos—the resolution of the coastline vector data may result in minor deviations from real-world measurements.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
### Note on Location Name Accuracy
Location names from geographic coordinates are **algorithmic estimates** based on geometric proximity. They may differ from historical logbooks or specific political definitions of maritime borders.
:::

## Interactive Map

The map below displays the spatial distribution of sediment cores. The markers are color-coded based on their distance from the nearest Norwegian coastline.

**How to use this map:**

*   **Zoom and Pan** to explore specific coastal areas or offshore regions.
*   **Click the Expand icon <i class="fas fa-expand"></i>** to reset the view.
*   **Filter** the data by toggling distance categories in the top-right menu (e.g., uncheck boxes to hide specific ranges).
*   Use the **Legend** in the bottom right to interpret the color coding.
*   **Hover** over a point to quickly identify the **Cruise** and **Core** IDs.
*   **Click** on a marker to view exact coordinates, distance to shore (in km), and location names.

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<style>
#site-map { height: 600px; width: 100%; border-radius: 6px; }

/* Layer control */
.leaflet-control-layers-list { font-size: 13px; }

/* Legend */
.site-legend {
  background: white;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.8;
}
.site-legend-title { font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.legend-dot {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 12px; height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  margin-right: 6px;
  vertical-align: middle;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
}

/* Home / reset button */
.leaflet-home-button {
  background: white;
  border: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  border-radius: 4px;
  width: 34px; height: 34px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 16px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #444;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.leaflet-home-button:hover { background: #f4f4f4; color: #000; }
</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// --- DB connection via stratum-tool ---
db = {
  const StratumSQLite = await window._stratumSQLite;
  return StratumSQLite.open(window._dbPath, {
    sqlJsPath: window._sqljsBase,
    cacheKey:  "pilot-mareano@v0.1.7",
  });
}

// --- Load Leaflet JS ---
L = require("https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js")

// --- Default view ---
home_lat  = 68
home_lng  = 15
home_zoom = 4

// --- Distance category order and colours (turbo-like palette) ---
dist_order  = ["0 to 10km", "10 to 30km", "30 to 100km", "≥100km"]
dist_colors = ({
  "0 to 10km":   "#30123b",
  "10 to 30km":  "#28bbec",
  "30 to 100km": "#a2fc3c",
  "≥100km":      "#fb8022"
})
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// --- Query site points ---
points_web = db.query(`
  SELECT distinct c2.cruise_id,
                  c1.core_id,
                  c1.ddn,
                  c1.dde,
                  c1.dist_to_coast,
                  CASE
                      WHEN c1.dist_to_coast <= 10 THEN '0 to 10km'
                      WHEN c1.dist_to_coast <= 30 THEN '10 to 30km'
                      WHEN c1.dist_to_coast <= 100 THEN '30 to 100km'
                      ELSE '≥100km'
                  END AS Distance,
                  c1.country,
                  c1.country_code,
                  c1.municipality,
                  c1.sea_name
  FROM core c1
           JOIN cruise c2
                ON c2.cruise_id = c1.cruise_id
`)
```

```{ojs}
//| column: page

{
  // --- Map container ---
  const container = html`<div id="site-map"></div>`
  yield container

  if (!container._map) {
    // Initialise map
    const map = L.map(container, { zoomControl: true })
      .setView([home_lat, home_lng], home_zoom)

    L.tileLayer("https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png", {
      attribution: '© <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright">OpenStreetMap</a> contributors © <a href="https://carto.com/">CARTO</a>',
      maxZoom: 19
    }).addTo(map)

    // --- Home / reset button ---
    const HomeControl = L.Control.extend({
      options: { position: "topleft" },
      onAdd(map) {
        const btn = L.DomUtil.create("a", "leaflet-home-button")
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa fa-expand" aria-hidden="true"></i>'
        btn.title = "Reset to default view"
        btn.setAttribute("aria-label", "Reset to default view")
        L.DomEvent.on(btn, "click", (e) => {
          L.DomEvent.stopPropagation(e)
          map.setView([home_lat, home_lng], home_zoom)
        })
        return btn
      }
    })
    new HomeControl().addTo(map)

    // --- Layer groups (one per distance category) ---
    const layerGroups = {}
    for (const cat of dist_order) {
      layerGroups[cat] = L.layerGroup().addTo(map)
    }

    // --- Add markers ---
    for (const d of points_web) {
      if (d.ddn == null || d.dde == null) continue
      const color = dist_colors[d.Distance] ?? "#888"
      const marker = L.circleMarker([d.ddn, d.dde], {
        radius:      4,
        color:       color,
        fillColor:   color,
        fillOpacity: 0.5,
        weight:      1
      })

      marker.bindTooltip(
        `Cruise: ${d.cruise_id}, Core: ${d.core_id}`,
        { sticky: true }
      )

      marker.bindPopup(`
        <strong>Cruise ID:</strong> ${d.cruise_id}<br>
        <strong>Core ID:</strong> ${d.core_id}<br>
        <strong>Latitude:</strong> ${d.ddn != null ? d.ddn.toFixed(2) : "—"}<br>
        <strong>Longitude:</strong> ${d.dde != null ? d.dde.toFixed(2) : "—"}<br>
        <strong>Distance:</strong> ${d.dist_to_coast != null ? d.dist_to_coast.toFixed(1) + " km" : "—"}<br>
        <strong>Country:</strong> ${d.country ?? "—"}<br>
        <strong>Country Code:</strong> ${d.country_code ?? "—"}<br>
        <strong>Municipality:</strong> ${d.municipality ?? "—"}<br>
        <strong>Sea/Ocean Name:</strong> ${d.sea_name ?? "—"}
      `)

      layerGroups[d.Distance]?.addLayer(marker)
    }

    // --- Layer control (top-right toggle) ---
    // Reverse order so nearest distance is at top
    const overlays = {}
    for (const cat of [...dist_order].reverse()) {
      overlays[cat] = layerGroups[cat]
    }
    L.control.layers(null, overlays, { collapsed: false }).addTo(map)

    // --- Legend (bottom-right) ---
    const LegendControl = L.Control.extend({
      options: { position: "bottomright" },
      onAdd() {
        const div = L.DomUtil.create("div", "site-legend")
        div.innerHTML = `<div class="site-legend-title">Distance to Coast</div>` +
          dist_order.map(cat =>
            `<div>
              <span class="legend-dot" style="background:${dist_colors[cat]}"></span>${cat}
            </div>`
          ).join("")
        return div
      }
    })
    new LegendControl().addTo(map)

    container._map = map
  }
}
```
